stations.name: The All 80s Hits Station
stations.description: Madonna, Bon Jovi, Duran Duran, synth-pop anthems & MTV-era power hits.
stations.full_description: From Madonna and Bon Jovi to Duran Duran and Tears for Fears — our All 80s Hits Station delivers the best of MTV-era synth-pop, power ballads, and arena anthems. Neon energy, sing-along choruses, and pure 80s nostalgia.

stations.name: The All 70s (No Disco) Hits Station
stations.description: Fleetwood Mac, Eagles, ELO, free-form guitar rock & soulful grooves.
stations.full_description: Pure 70s rock and pop — no disco, just the guitar-driven classics that defined a generation. Fleetwood Mac, Eagles, ELO, Doobie Brothers, and more.

stations.name: The Classic Rock Station
stations.description: Journey, Queen, Tom Petty, Doobie Brothers & timeless arena anthems.
stations.full_description: The songs that defined rock and roll across multiple decades — from the British Invasion through the arena rock era. Journey, Queen, Tom Petty, SRV, and more.

stations.name: The All Oldies Hits Station
stations.description: Beatles, Motown, British Invasion, Temptations & 60s/70s classics.
stations.full_description: The songs your grandparents danced to and your parents sang in the car. Beatles, Motown, British Invasion, and the golden era of American pop.
